data.name: Project: Stellar Girls
data.detailed_description:
Join the exciting adventure with "Project: Stellar Girls" - a match-3 game. Beautiful girls in stunning costumes, armed with incredible guns, are ready to help you complete the game. Let's embark on this adventure!



In this game, you need to correctly match identical crystals in a row to make them disappear. Your goal is to earn points and unlock new levels. After completing several levels, you'll gain access to beautiful girls in the gallery.

Collect the required number of points and conquer one level after another together with these lovely and beautiful girls. With each new level, breaking crystals and unlocking girls will become more and more interesting! Enjoy both the engaging game and the charming, hot girls! Many exciting levels with stunning effects await you! This game will captivate you!



  • Incredible visual effects
  • Progress through levels with the in-game girls
  • Unlock and collect images
  • Achieve numerous achievements
  • Relax with music while playing
  • Skip any level with just one tap
  • Enjoy your day with adorable girls!

data.short_description: Join the exciting adventure with "Project: Stellar Girls" - a match-3 game. Beautiful girls in stunning costumes, armed with incredible guns, are ready to help you complete the game. Let's embark on this adventure!
data.supported_languages:
英文, 越南文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 泰文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
